title: Payakumbuh Heat Wave
lead: Payakumbuh is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.49. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Payakumbuh has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 62%, and the wind speed is approximately 6.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's energy demand is expected to surge due to increased use of cooling systems.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
